commands.author: joshuaswarren
commands.command: all feedback from your recent review has been addressed in the latest pushed head `b9ec52b62a`. - preserved reset notification semantics: successful gateway/plugin reset paths now emit through the shared reset flow, and the stale direct handler-only broadcast removal is covered by the replacement `sessions.changed` subscriber test in `src/gateway/session-message-events.test.ts`. - documented the new public sdk helper: `api.resetsession(key, reason?)` is now documented in `docs/plugins/sdk-runtime.md`, including full-mode availability and structured success/failure results. - added the required user-facing changelog entry under `2026.5.2` for the plugin sdk addition. - fixed the ci parser failure from the rebase by removing the duplicate `plugindiagnostic` type import in `src/plugins/registry.ts`. focused local checks run after the final rebase: - `pnpm test -- src/plugins/reset-session.test.ts` passed. - `pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check` passed after regenerating the sdk api hash. - `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/plugins/types.ts src/plugins/registry.ts src/plugins/reset-session.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/sessions.ts src/gateway/session-reset-service.ts src/gateway/session-message-events.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/core.ts docs/plugins/sdk-runtime.md changelog.md` passed. the earlier github ci failure was real and related to the duplicate import; that is now fixed and pushed. i also checked the remaining local `test:bundled` diagnostic-listener failure against current `origin/main`, and it reproduces there with the same assertion, so it is not introduced by this pr.
commands.freeform_prompt: all feedback from your recent review has been addressed in the latest pushed head `b9ec52b62a`. - Preserved reset notification semantics: successful gateway/plugin reset paths now emit through the shared reset flow, and the stale direct handler-only broadcast removal is covered by the replacement `sessions.changed` subscriber test in `src/gateway/session-message-events.test.ts`. - Documented the new public SDK helper: `api.resetSession(key, reason?)` is now documented in `docs/plugins/sdk-runtime.md`, including full-mode availability and structured success/failure results. - Added the required user-facing changelog entry under `2026.5.2` for the plugin SDK addition. - Fixed the CI parser failure from the rebase by removing the duplicate `PluginDiagnostic` type import in `src/plugins/registry.ts`. Focused local checks run after the final rebase: - `pnpm test -- src/plugins/reset-session.test.ts` passed. - `pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check` passed after regenerating the SDK API hash. - `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/plugins/types.ts src/plugins/registry.ts src/plugins/reset-session.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/sessions.ts src/gateway/session-reset-service.ts src/gateway/session-message-events.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/core.ts docs/plugins/sdk-runtime.md CHANGELOG.md` passed. The earlier GitHub CI failure was real and related to the duplicate import; that is now fixed and pushed. I also checked the remaining local `test:bundled` diagnostic-listener failure against current `origin/main`, and it reproduces there with the same assertion, so it is not introduced by this PR.
commands.reason: author association NONE and repository permission read are not allowed
